scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build: npm install --include=optional && npm -w frontend run build && npm -w admin run build
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm -w backend run test && npm -w frontend run test && npm -w ai-engine run test
